summary: Tested CineBites QR in-seat ordering backend (10/10 pytest PASS) and full frontend E2E flow. Backend is fully functional. Frontend flow (seat landing -> menu -> cart -> payment -> place order -> confirmation -> admin) mostly works, but the Confirmation page is missing required UI (short_id, seat badge, status tracker) — it renders only a generic 'Order Confirmed' message with no order details or Preparing->OFD->Delivered tracker.

ui_bugs.issue: Page renders only 'Order Confirmed' heading + 'Sit back…' subtitle + 'Order Something Else' button. Missing: order short_id display, seat badge (B12), and the Preparing -> Out for Delivery -> Delivered status tracker. Spec explicitly requires these. Likely data fetch silently failing or component not rendering order data.

integration_issues.issue: Order is created successfully (POST /api/orders returns 200 and redirect to /confirmation/{id} happens), but the confirmation page does not show any fetched order fields — check GET /api/orders/{id} call in OrderConfirmationPage.jsx and render logic for short_id/seat/status tracker.

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage.jsx to render order short_id, seat badge, and the 3-step status tracker (Preparing -> Out for Delivery -> Delivered) with the first step highlighted when status='preparing'. Verify GET /api/orders/{id} is invoked and its result rendered.
Ensure data-testid attributes exist on the confirmation order id element, seat badge, and each status tracker step for testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — consider lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
CORSMiddleware is added AFTER include_router — this still works but convention is to add middleware before including routers.
Menu seed is not idempotent by content — only checks collection count. Acceptable for MVP.
No pagination on /api/orders (to_list(500)) — fine for MVP, revisit at scale.
OrderStatus uses Literal in Pydantic; PATCH payload validation works as expected (tested).
seed_data_creation: Backend startup auto-seeds 12 menu items; E2E test created 1-2 real orders (AMB Cinemas, Screen 2, Seat B12) in MongoDB 'orders' collection. Backend pytest also creates additional orders. No cleanup performed (no TEST_ prefix on orders since schema has no such field).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all 10 tests pass. The only functional gap found is on /confirmation/{id} — the page does not render the order short_id, seat badge, or status tracker. Rest of flow (landing -> menu with 4 cats + stepper -> sticky cart -> cart with 5% taxes -> payment UPI/Card -> order creation) all verified visually and returns correct redirect. Admin live status update buttons were not exercised end-to-end because test was aborted at confirmation assert; backend PATCH status is fully covered by pytest.
rca of the issue: Likely cause: OrderConfirmationPage.jsx either (a) does not fetch order details via GET /api/orders/{id}, or (b) fetches but fails to render short_id/seat/status tracker components. Reproduction: start at /order?screen=2&seat=B12 -> Start Ordering -> add any item -> View Cart -> Proceed to Payment -> select UPI -> Place Order. Observe /confirmation/{id} URL reached but page shows only 'Order Confirmed' heading and an 'Order Something Else' button. Mitigation: inspect OrderConfirmationPage.jsx, ensure useParams id is used, fetch order, and render short_id, seat, and status tracker with data-testids.
